differential_diagnoses: Infectious enteritis (chronic Giardiasis) in the setting of hypogammaglobulinemia
next_steps: Surgical consultation for management of complicated jejunal wall thickening, aneurysmal dilatation, and potential ischemia
Resection of involved jejunal segments with pathological evaluation (lymphoma vs. inflammatory)
Repeat immunoglobulin panel and lymphocyte subset analysis to confirm CVID
Formal hematology consultation to evaluate the clonal NK-cell population
Consider genetic testing for CVID-related mutations (e.g., CTLA4, LRBA, PIK3CD)
Stool studies for alternative pathogens given history of hypogammaglobulinemia
